title: carduus tmoleus subsp. cronius
intro: Carduus tmoleus subsp. cronius, also known as thistle, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Carduus tmoleus subsp. cronius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to extract its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
